arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen's Patrik Schick on battling Bayern Munich, form, fitness and more
arts.sum: Back to his very best with 21 competitive goals already this season, Patrik Schick is leading the charge for Bayer Leverkusen as they look to retain their Bundesliga title in a rivalry with Bayern Munich that will now spill over into the UEFA Champions League. I scored a lot of goals for Leverkusen, and we won the Bundesliga, the DFB Cup and the Supercup, and we are in the Champions League .”

arts.ttl: Dayot Upamecano and Min-Jae Kim both have release clauses in their Bayern Munich contracts
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayern Munich’s central defensive pairing of Dayot Upamecano and Min-Jae Kim both have release clauses in their current deals. The cost of Upamecano’s current release clause is said…

arts.ttl: Upamecano to be rested against Stuttgart?
arts.sum: Eric Dier and Kim Minjae could pair up again at the heart of Bayern's defence against Stuttgart, with Dayot Upamecano still not 100 percent fit.

arts.ttl: Neymar reveals he almost joined Bayern
arts.sum: According to Neymar, Pep Guardiola wanted to take him to Bayern in 2013.

arts.ttl: Opinion | Joshua Kimmich is making a mistake in not signing Bayern Munich contract
arts.sum: As GGFN reported this week, Bayer Munich has withdrawn its contract offer to Joshua Kimmich after the player stalled in responding. The contract was a slight increase on his current…

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich developing contingency plan for potential Joshua Kimmich exit?; Bayern eyeing Tottenham Hotspur’s Son Heung-min?; Real Madrid, Liverpool, Chelsea, Newcastle United, PSG among those vying for Dean Huijsen; and MORE!
arts.sum: With news that Bayern Munich pulled its contract offer to Joshua Kimmich running rampant, the club has already begun looking at potential replacements in the background per Sky Sport . That said, Bayern Munich has been linked with players like Atlético Madrid ’s Pablo Barrios and Inter Milan ’s Hakan Çalhanoğlu in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane’s Bundesliga logo goal fittingly named Goal of the Year for 2024
arts.sum: The 2024 Bundesliga Goal of the Year, announced at the beginning of February, goes to none other but Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane — fittingly, for his Bundesliga logo act last November against FC Augsburg. It was a unique goal for me, a mix of technical and physical components and a nice finish,” Kane said in comments captured via @iMiaSanMia .

Over the past week, Bayern Munich has started celebrations for its 125th anniversary, which have included a gala, special illumination for the Allianz Arena, and numerous other efforts to reach the fans. Being a fan of the club makes it feel like I am part of a worldwide family.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany ready for “dangerous” VfB Stuttgart side
arts.sum: We’ve focused solely on that, we haven’t taken a single step less in our preparation because the game is very important for us,” said Kompany (as captured by BuLiNews.com ). Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany is not going to get caught looking ahead to next Wednesday’s Champions League showdown with Bayer Leverkusen.
